# init

**Instance Method**

Initializes the device.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual bool init();
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if initialization was successful, or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if it was unsuccessful.

## Running the Service

- **Open**: Opens a session to the PCI device.
- **Close**: Closes the session to the PCI device.
- **free**: Performs any final cleanup for the object.
